retraining_proposals.reason: Corpus expansion before retraining typically yields better gains than retraining alone
retraining_proposals.expected_benefit: Broader coverage → better generalization → lower error across all buckets
retraining_proposals.recommended_rung: After expansion: 40K or selective 20K from expanded corpus
retraining_proposals.notes: Expand corpus first, then retrain — this is the highest ROI strategy
